scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,marketing -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:marketing"
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +
scripts.update-and-verify: pnpm run update-deps && pnpm -r -w install && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r -w run typecheck
